port.title: PLC Port
port.description: Port number of your PLC server (1-65535)

pollingInterval.title: Polling Interval (seconds)
pollingInterval.description: How often to poll the PLC for state updates (in seconds, recommended 5-300)

commandTimeout.title: Command Timeout (ms)
commandTimeout.description: Timeout for PLC commands in milliseconds (recommended 1000-30000)

discoveryTimeout.title: Discovery Timeout (ms)
discoveryTimeout.description: Timeout for initial discovery commands in milliseconds (recommended 5000-60000)

autoDiscoveryInterval.title: Auto-Discovery Interval (minutes)
autoDiscoveryInterval.description: Interval for automatic rediscovery of devices (0 to disable, recommended 0-1440)
